claim: QL15 K-scan residual: K=12 -> 9.08211e-5 (P-V), K=16 -> 1.1718e-5 (P-III), K=20 -> 6.61173e-4 (P-V), K=24 -> 5.07365e-4 (P-III); residual fails to stay <= 1e-4 across K and best equation flips P-V <-> P-III, confirming Pade-truncation artefact
QL15 K-scan Pade nearest-pole radius |rho_*|: K=12 -> 3.391, K=16 -> 1.239, K=20 -> 5.185, K=24 -> 3.815; spread 3.95 (>> 0.5 cutoff), no convergence to a finite-radius Borel singularity

QL26 K-scan residual: K=12 -> 2.81632e-5 (P-III), K=16 -> 1.97114e-3 (P-III), K=20 -> 1.36393e-3 (P-III), K=24 -> 4.47631e-2 (P-V); residual grows by 3 orders of magnitude over the K range, confirming Pade-truncation artefact
QL26 K-scan Pade nearest-pole radius |rho_*|: K=12 -> 1.800, K=16 -> 3.721, K=20 -> 4.292, K=24 -> 4.753; monotone increase with K (spread 2.95), no finite-radius Borel singularity

QL15 trans-series h_k coefficients are stable to 14 digits across K in {12,16,20,24} (h_1=0.97222222222222, h_2=-0.70987654320988, h_3=0.61738683127572 at K=24); the Borel-channel signal extraction itself is reliable, the breakdown is downstream in the Pade-Borel resummation

QL26 trans-series h_k coefficients are stable to 14 digits across K in {12,16,20,24} (h_1=0.055555555555556, h_2=-0.52854938271605, h_3=0.62163065843621 at K=24); same stability pattern as QL15 and V_quad
QL15 trans-series LSQ residual on log|delta_n| improves with K: 3.612e-24 (K=12) -> 5.894e-30 (K=16) -> 9.257e-37 (K=20) -> 5.809e-41 (K=24); >= 24-digit fit at K=12 and >= 40 digits at K=24
QL26 trans-series LSQ residual on log|delta_n| improves with K: 5.145e-23 (K=12) -> 2.892e-30 (K=16) -> 1.447e-34 (K=20) -> 3.056e-40 (K=24)
WKB closed-form alpha_pred = A - 2*log(c_b) + log|c_a| matches alpha_obs to >= 13 digits for all 6 Delta<0 degree-2 PCFs (V_quad: 13, QL01: exact, QL02: 13, QL06: 14, QL15: 15, QL26: 13)

Side-by-side K-scan: V_quad, QL15, QL26 all exhibit the same artefact pattern (residual fails to stabilise at <= 1e-4 across K, Pade nearest-pole radius drifts unboundedly with K). No structural split between the V_quad gate and the two MARGINAL families
